form.layout: ==========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[单号] orgId[业务组织] inspectionType[检验类型] docStatus[单据状态] approveStatus[审核状态] businessDate[业务日期] ==========>inspection[检验信息]====== materialId[物料] templateId[质检模板] supplierId[供应商] warehouseId[仓库] batchNo[批号] inspectionDate[检验日期] inspectorId[检验员(职员)] result[质检结果] ==========>sample[抽样信息]====== lotQuantity[批量] sampleQuantity[抽样数量] relatedBillType[关联单据类型] relatedBillCode[关联单据号] relatedLineCode[关联单据行号] ==========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

==========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[单号] orgId[业务组织] inspectionType[检验类型] docStatus[单据状态] approveStatus[审核状态] businessDate[业务日期] ==========>inspection[检验信息]====== materialId[物料] templateId[质检模板] supplierId[供应商] warehouseId[仓库] batchNo[批号] inspectionDate[检验日期] inspectorId[检验员(职员)] result[质检结果] ==========>sample[抽样信息]====== lotQuantity[批量] sampleQuantity[抽样数量] relatedBillType[关联单据类型] relatedBillCode[关联单据号] relatedLineCode[关联单据行号] remark[备注](2)

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: code[单号] docStatus[单据状态] result[质检结果] materialId[物料] inspectionDate[检验日期]
